_provenance: PA-18: Hand-authored. Schema-derived from database.py _autotune_run_row_to_dict (14-column SELECT shape). Represents a real failure mode: Optuna trials that produced float('-inf') sentinel values in alpha/Sharpe fields (e.g. a walk-forward window with no valid trades). The Python json module emits literal -Infinity for float('-inf'), which JS JSON.parse rejects per RFC 8259. Confirmed from operator report: curl shows literal -Infinity at position ~999 in /api/autotune-runs response.
description: A row where several numeric fields contain float sentinel values (-inf, +inf, nan) that Python json emits as non-JSON literals. Fix: _finite_or_none coercion in _autotune_run_row_to_dict.
